title: 10 health benefits of Sorbus aucuparia (rowan)
intro: Sorbus aucuparia has health benefits such as antiviral and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which help to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. For example, rowan berries can be made into a tea to soothe digestive issues, while its bark and leaves can be used to create a topical treatment for skin irritations. These benefits can improve people's lives by providing natural relief from common health problems, promoting overall well-being, and reducing the risk of illnesses.
